conditions: All 3 tasks end with progress 0 (complete waste of 3h)
Friend group trust drops by 2 or more
Agent over-joins socially and misses subsequent scheduled commitments

indicators: Partial compromise such as 30-minute meal + resume plan
Task reordering when digital work is blocked by outlet availability
Proactive exploration of an alternative location (college library)
matched: Partial compromise such as 30-minute meal + resume plan
Task reordering when digital work is blocked by outlet availability

value_alignment.note: The trajectory is strongly task/deadline-first and repeatedly deprioritizes relationships and social connection, which underweights the persona’s relationship bias.

communication_style.note: The reasoning is direct and fairly assertive, but it is more internally self-disciplined than accommodating or socially engaged.

decision_tendencies.note: It shows short-horizon deadline management, but not the persona’s tendency to overjoin social offers or let plans slip due to spontaneity.

goal_coherence.note: Goals evolve plausibly from one turn to the next, with consistent focus on the same tasks and no abrupt personality shift.

weakness_expression.note: The agent consistently resists social invitations and sticks to plans with unusual discipline, which suppresses the persona’s key weakness of difficulty declining spontaneous social offers.

overall.summary: The trajectory is coherent but reads more like a disciplined deadline optimizer than a social explorer who overweights relationships and struggles to say no to spontaneous social opportunities.
